Metadata.title: VocaRank - The Definitive Vocaloid Ranking & Platform
Metadata.description: Discover the most popular Vocaloid songs. Explore real-time song rankings, deep analysis of voicebank stats, and build your own playlists.

Home.subtitle: Track the pulse of the Vocaloid community. Real-time rankings from YouTube and Niconico aggregated in one place.
Home.cta_signup: Create an account — save favorites & track rankings
Home.preview_notice: This site is under development — some features may be incomplete
Home.top_movers_loading: Rankings are being calculated. Check back soon!
Home.feature_ranking_desc: Daily, weekly, and monthly song rankings sorted by view gain across YouTube and Niconico.
Home.feature_search_desc: Find any Vocaloid song or artist across our entire database by name in English, Japanese, or Romaji.
Home.feature_statistics_desc: Explore voicebank usage ratios, and production trends over time.
Home.feature_network_desc: Visualize collaboration graphs between producers and voicebanks.
Home.feature_player_desc: Listen to songs directly in the browser — build playlists and share them with friends.
Home.feature_favorites_desc: Save your favourite songs and artists to a personal collection. Sign in to get started.
Home.about_body:
VocaRank is a real-time ranking platform for Vocaloid songs. By aggregating view counts from YouTube and Niconico every hour, it allows you to not only discover the latest trends in Vocaloid music but also track the historical performance of each song from past to present.

More than just a ranking site, VocaRank integrates with the community-driven VocaDB database, letting users dive deep into the massive Vocaloid music community. In addition to recent trending charts, the site offers long-term data analysis—including trends in voicebank usage and interactive network graphs that visualize collaborations between creators.

With our beautifully designed built-in music player, you can listen to everything from legendary classics to the latest hits anytime, as well as create and share your own playlists. VocaRank is the ultimate platform for all Vocaloid fans to trace the history, discover new songs, and fully experience the charm of Vocaloid music.

Moods.title: Community Votes

Graph.title: Network of Vocaloid Producers
Graph.description: Explore the network of Vocaloid producers based on their collaborations
Graph.caption: Each node represents a Vocaloid producer. Edges connect producers who have collaborated on at least one song together. Node size is determined by the selected weight metric (total views or collaboration centrality).

GraphVocalist.title: Network of Vocaloid Voicebanks
GraphVocalist.description: Explore the multi-synth collaboration network where two voicebanks appear together in the same song
GraphVocalist.caption: Each node represents a synthesizer voicebank. Edges connect voicebanks that appear together in at least one song. Node size is determined by the selected weight metric.

StatisticVocaloid.title: Vocaloid Trends
StatisticVocaloid.description: Explore historical publishing trends and voicebank usages
StatisticVocaloid.caption: Covers Original, Remix, Remaster, and Cover songs that feature at least one synthesizer vocalist — VOCALOID, UTAU, CeVIO, Synthesizer V, Neutrino, VoiSona, or other voice synthesizers. Data sourced from the VocaRank database, synchronized with VocaDB.
StatisticVocaloid.view_ratio_caption: YouTube-to-NicoNico view ratio grouped by total view count range, for vocaloid songs with valid view counts on both platforms. Each bar shows the median ratio; the error bar spans P25–P75, meaning the middle 50% of songs in that range fall within those whiskers. The red line shows the mean.
